brigandine.name: Brigandine
brigandine.description: Riveted steel plates sewn inside a stout leather coat — flexible and tough.

banded_mail.name: Banded Mail
banded_mail.description: Overlapping steel bands over a mail hauberk — a veteran soldier's standard.

fortified_plate.name: Fortified Plate
fortified_plate.description: Full plate reforged with reinforcing ribs, proof against all but the heaviest blows.

dragonscale_mail.name: Dragonscale Mail
dragonscale_mail.description: Armour of overlapping dragon scales — nigh impervious to flame.

aegis_of_dawn.name: Aegis of Dawn
aegis_of_dawn.description: Radiant plate said to have turned an Elder Wyrm's breath. It glows faintly at the approach of evil.

steel_shield.name: Steel Shield
steel_shield.description: A heavy kite of forged steel; it turns a blade with a bright ring.

robe_of_the_magi.name: Robe of the Magi
robe_of_the_magi.description: A star-flecked robe worn by masters of the arcane.

warded_plate.name: Warded Plate
warded_plate.description: Full plate etched with runes that turn aside blade and spell alike.

cloak_of_protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak_of_protection.description: A shimmering cloak that ward its wearer from harm.

elven_chain.name: Elven Chain
elven_chain.description: Mithril links light as silk, forged by elven smiths.

robe_of_vitality.name: Robe of Vitality
robe_of_vitality.description: A green robe that quickens the flesh to heal.

spellguard_shield.name: Spellguard Shield
spellguard_shield.description: A shield humming with abjuration — it drinks hostile magic.
